article_meta.title: Immigration Here's Where You Can Report Illegal Alien Truck Drivers Before They Kill More Americans By: Breccan F

reasoning: Multiple attribution violations (flagging quoted/tweeted and clearly attributed claims), extensive use of non-allowed bias type labels, and some missed author-level bias. Some genuine author-prose bias was identified, but errors are frequent.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: Flagged content from a Secretary’s tweet and direct quotes from Sen. Banks; also flagged language clearly attributed to Banks. These are not the author’s own prose.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: At least three flagged items are not author voice (tweet/quotes/attributed), making them false positives; others are arguable instances of slant or emotionalism.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed repeated loaded term usage in the body (e.g., recurring 'illegal alien') and did not cleanly isolate the author’s sweeping claim 'Every death... could have been prevented.' Also missed other slanted framings assigning blame.
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Used non-listed categories (e.g., 'Loaded Language', 'Appeal to Fear', 'Imbalanced Reporting') instead of the specified labels, so type accuracy is poor across items.
